subcodes.first_line: O friends of God! Praise be to God that ye have been favored with the effulgent rays of the Sun of Truth and have attained unto the sanctuary of divine knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان الهی الحمد لله باشراقات انوار شمس حقیقت فائز شدید و بکعبه عرفان بعد
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @spiritual transformation, @goodly deeds; actions, @knowledge; recognition of God, @Manifestation of God as sun
